title: SEIU Local 509 — 2025 Annual Meeting / Nominating Convention
description: Scraped Markdown of the SEIU Local 509 '2025 Annual Meeting' page describing the union's Annual Meeting / Nominating Convention on Saturday, October 18, 2025 at the Hilton Boston Park Plaza. Documents the hybrid (in-person + virtual) format, accessibility & logistics (ASL/Spanish interpretation, childcare, parking voucher, fragrance-free policy), nomination guidelines, campaigning rules, candidate-statement word limits and deadlines, and the ballot mail/return/count/swear-in schedule. Useful as authoritative context on Local 509 internal governance and election procedures.
notes: Authoritative: official SEIU Local 509 union content scraped from seiu509.org. Leading lines are boilerplate cookie-consent text and a trailing gtranslate language switcher (English/Haitian Creole/Portuguese/Spanish) that are page chrome, not dataset content. Dates (Oct 18 meeting; Oct 27 candidate-statement deadline; Nov 10 ballot mail; Dec 3 return; Dec 4 count; Dec 9 swearing-in) describe the 2025 election cycle.
